plan_summary: This is a simple text replacement task in the Dashboard component. Find the status bar in the top right that currently displays 'All systems operational' and change it to 'Agent System Online'. No logic changes, no new features, just a single string replacement.

files.description: Find the status indicator text that says 'All systems operational' in the top right status bar and change it to 'Agent System Online'. This is a single text string replacement only.

integration_notes: No integration changes needed. This is a purely visual/text update in an existing component. No routes, no API calls, no state management changes required.
testing_instructions: 1. Start the frontend dev server (npm start in frontend/) and the backend (python main.py in backend/). 2. Open Dashboard.jsx and confirm the change was made. 3. Verify in the browser at http://localhost:3000 that the status bar in the top right now reads 'Agent System Online' instead of 'All systems operational'. 4. Confirm the green dot indicator is still present next to the text.
